{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032319203474A9FC78ADD7C55DBABF"}"},"total":124},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7305610517459387162","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书结构很紧凑，是那种带脑子的文，作者文笔也非常好，很推荐。不过，国家的提示有作用，但不多。主角的人设我是很喜欢的，也有很多队友，有互相帮助，也有一些敌对，总之很有意思，五星"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1700970881,"group_id":"7246221601694288955","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N54bhnbSHI75DdBA9Ts2tNulzBcwSvtD2kv76Rgfm7qn","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/72943d190e06490fa591804340b70646~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788434&x-signature=pn7BW0Bq3Mys2k0ytOzZf8fONm0%3D","user_id":"1768463860514718","user_name":"白日梦不酷吗"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1768463860514718","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7246221601694288955","book_info":{"abstract":"【诡异+推理+国运+直播+悬疑+无女主】
规则怪谈降临。
各国将随机产生多名天选者，进入怪谈世界试炼。
家乡被怪谈摧毁的周宇，意外成为了龙国的天选者。
他的成败将直接决定龙国的存亡。
每当初次进入怪谈世界都将角色扮演，抽取身份牌和天赋。
奴隶、平民、勇者、国王……
以及特殊的幽灵和狂魔等身份牌。
开局周宇不幸抽中了最弱的奴隶牌，但却幸运的抽中了SSS天赋。
在充满了尔虞我诈，诡物横行的怪谈世界中。
周宇将一次次利用天赋化险为夷，解决地狱级别的诡物。
最终为龙国赢得喘息和复兴的机会。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/c8b9cf04b6683192cd03b4b363d2bac2~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"天赐","author_id":"","book_id":"7246221601694288955","book_name":"我在规则怪谈拥有不死之身","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":496,"name":"国运","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=496&name=国运&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7246224357792418871","read_count":"874","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1133935"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.8","serial_count":"518","tags":"悬疑脑洞,直播,灵异,无女主,国运,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c8b9cf04b6683192cd03b4b363d2bac2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779448834&x-signature=4%2FFmjJ%2BvGyQ1Azzp4YfknUofmLU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4.6343847e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032319203474A9FC78ADD7C55DBABF"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读13小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwarded_count"
